hero.subtitle: La solution de gestion de stock intelligente dopée à l'IA pour automatiser vos commandes et maximiser vos profits.

features.title: Vos outils quotidiens
features.subtitle: Une suite complète d'onglets pour gérer chaque aspect de votre business.

products.title: Produits

orders.title: Commandes

accounting.title: Comptabilité

clients.title: Clients

how_it_works.title: Démarrage rapide

step1.title: Créez votre compte
step1.desc: Téléchargez l'application et configurez votre boutique en moins de 2 minutes.

step2.title: Scannez vos produits
step2.desc: Utilisez la caméra de votre téléphone pour ajouter rapidement votre stock.

step3.title: Encaissez & Suivez
step3.desc: Faites vos premières ventes et regardez vos statistiques grimper en temps réel.

testimonials.title: Ils nous font confiance
testimonials.subtitle: Découvrez comment Stockman aide les commerçants au quotidien.
testimonials.t1: Depuis que j'utilise Stockman, je ne perds plus d'argent à cause des ruptures de stock. L'IA me prévient toujours au bon moment !
testimonials.t2: L'application est tellement simple. Mes employés l'ont prise en main en 10 minutes. La gestion de caisse est parfaite.
testimonials.t3: J'adore la marketplace ! Je peux comparer les prix de mes fournisseurs et commander directement. Un gain de temps énorme.

pricing.subtitle: Fuɗɗu feyeere, ɓeydu no mbuɗ-ɗaa nii.

faq.a2: Hoolu ɗum. Emin kuutorɗe njuɓɓudi aaraango hiisawal ngam aarude kala humpitooji njaaƴu maa.

delete_account.title: Suppression de Compte & Données
delete_account.subtitle: Conformément au Règlement Général sur la Protection des Données (RGPD) et au Droit à l'Oubli.
delete_account.intro: Vous avez le contrôle total de vos données. Si vous souhaitez cesser d'utiliser Stockman, vous pouvez supprimer votre compte et l'intégralité des données associées de deux manières.
delete_account.method_app_desc: C'est la méthode la plus rapide et la plus sécurisée car elle valide votre identité instantanément.
method_app_steps: Faites défiler jusqu'à la section **Zone de danger**.
Confirmez en saisissant votre mot de passe.
delete_account.method_web_desc: Si vous n'avez plus accès à l'application, vous pouvez nous envoyer une demande manuelle de suppression.
delete_account.method_web_note: Note : Pour des raisons de sécurité, nous devrons vérifier votre identité par email ou téléphone avant de procéder à la suppression.
delete_account.data_erased_desc: La suppression de votre compte est **définitive** et irréversible. Les données suivantes seront immédiatement supprimées de nos serveurs de production :
data_erased_list: Toutes vos boutiques et points de vente.
L'intégralité de votre inventaire et catalogue produits.
Toutes vos transactions de vente et historiques comptables.
Vos listes de clients, fournisseurs et historiques d'achats.
Vos accès à l'Assistant IA et historiques de chat.
delete_account.retention_desc: Une fois la demande validée, vos données sont immédiatement marquées pour suppression. L'effacement complet de nos sauvegardes (backups) peut prendre jusqu'à 30 jours, pendant lesquels vos données restent inaccessibles et non traitées.

newsletter.title: Wontu karallo stok
newsletter.desc: Jokku e 5000+ njaaƴooɓe te heɓu ɗerewol ballo men: "Njuumte 10 bartooje ɓurale maa".

contact.title: Jokkondir en

whatsapp.message: Jam, miɗo yidɗi anndude ko ɓuri e Stockman!

cookie.message: Emin kuutorɗe ngam moƴƴinde humpito maa. So a jokkii, a jaɓii dawrugol men.

feature_pages.cta_title: Mbele a paree ngir moƴƴinde koldinaagu maa?

dashboard.title: Koldunorde
dashboard.subtitle: Koldinu njaayu maa e yillannde wootere
dashboard.description: Koldunorde maa ko suudu maa njaayu. Wonaa tonngoode tan — ina rokka ma laawol laaɓngol ngam ngalu maa. E kawtal IA, ina limta njaayu maa e waktu makko ngir tingunorgol ɓurale e baasal (stok jeexirɗo, stok keewɗo). Ko kambe ton a ƴettoyata pellital mawngal.
dashboard.f1_desc: Topptu ngalu maa, ɓurale maa e tonngoode njaayu maa e nder sigoŋ.
dashboard.f2_desc: Heɓu tinndinorgol njaayu ngam kuuge jeexirɗe wala kuuge ɓadaade dakkde.
dashboard.f3_desc: Naamnu ballo maa njaayu naamne a heɓa jaabi jooni-jooni e koldunorde maa.

kpi.title: Yillannde & KPIs
kpi.description: Topptu limtooji maa e waktu mum so a ubbii gollirgal ngal.

stats.title: Limtooji kuuɓtodinɗi
stats.description: Yi'u ngalu maa, ɓurale maa e peeje njaayu maa.

charts.title: Xayeoji gollal
charts.description: Topptu ɓeydagol stok maa te limto waktu njaayu maa.

analysis.title: Saytu ABC & Jallagal
analysis.description: Anndu gollirɗe ɓurde moƴƴude te heɓu neldugooji ngam njalla.

history.title: Téere gollal
history.description: Dencal kala gollirgal ngal naataa wala yaltat e stok maa.

products.title: Koldinaagu gollirɗe
products.subtitle: Stok maa, moƴƴinaa no feewi
products.description: Koldinaagu stok gollanteeɗo tawa alaa bone. So a jogii 10 wala 10,000 gollirgal, Stockman ina rokka ma laawol moƴƴinde ɗum no haanirta nii. Saytukaay borkood (barcode) e nder gollirgal ina defa telefon maa wontu gollirgal njaawngal.
products.f1_desc: Huutoro kamera telefon maa ngam ɓeydude gollirɗe wala jàngude stok maa e njaawre.
products.f2_desc: Sosu kategóriiji, markaaji e céti ngam moƴƴinde kër njaayu maa.
products.f3_desc: Anndu coggu timmungo stok maa e kala waktu (coggu jënd e coggu njaayu).

list.title: Dogo gollirɗe
list.description: Heɓu njaawre e dogo maa timmungo e saytukaay mbeesu.

create.title: Sosal weeɓungal
create.description: Ɓeydu gollirgal e nder sigoŋaaji e kala humpito murata.

variants.title: Céti e detay
variants.description: Koldinu mangu, kulëri e cogguuji goɗɗi ngam kala céti.

thresholds.title: Stok e tinndinorgol
thresholds.description: Tëral tinndinorgol so stok ina nawa ngam a reera njaayu maa.

pos.title: POS (Caisse)
pos.subtitle: Fey kilyanɓe e weeɓre
pos.description: Rokku kilyanɓe maa laawol fey mbeesu te jaawngol. POS men jaawi no feewi: ɓeydu gollirɗe, koldinu rabatuji te fey e laabi keewɗi e nder sigoŋaaji.
pos.f1_desc: Laawol mbeesu ngam ɓeydude gollirɗe e panniyé e waktu mum.
pos.f2_desc: Neldu resitiji e WhatsApp, SMS wala Email kilyanɓe maa.
pos.f3_desc: Jaɓu kaalis, Mobile Money wala kartuji te topptu kala ko naataa e koldunorde maa.

sale.title: Laawol njaayu
sale.description: Ɓeydu gollirɗe e panniyé, koldinu limto e rabatuji.

receipt.title: Resit e Code QR
receipt.description: Sosu resit jaawngol e code QR ngam kilyanɓe maa scan.

suppliers.title: Ñootooɓe e Marketplace
suppliers.subtitle: Jënd maa weeɓii jooni
suppliers.description: Defal jënd maa mu wontu semmbe maa. Stockman ina kawtina moƴƴinaa kala ñootooɓe maa te ubbana ma Marketplace men murre. Natt Cogguuji e waktu mum te yamir e suudu.
suppliers.f1_desc: Kawtinu humpitooji ñootooɓe maa e istoriku jënd maa e amen.
suppliers.f2_desc: Sosu mbataaxali jënd e kiliik 1 no stok maa soxalee.
suppliers.f3_desc: Yiilu ñootoowo ɓurɗo yombude ngam kala gollirgal e saytukaay men.

marketplace.title: Marketplace nder
marketplace.description: Heɓu mboolaari ñootooɓe aaraango te natt cogguuji.

catalog.title: Humpito ñootoowo
catalog.description: Yi'u gollirɗe gollotooɗo amana e sartiiji mum.

order.title: Gollal njaayu
order.description: Sosu te neldu yamirgooji jalla e sigoŋaaji seeɗa.

orders.title: Topptagol njaayu
orders.subtitle: Fuɗɗoode yamirgal haa naata e bitik
orders.description: Jogal laawol timmungo e njaayu maa. Fuɗɗoode yamirgal haa feytitgol e bitik, topptu kala ko waɗata. Stok maa ina simaye sigoŋ so gollirɗe naatii.
orders.f1_desc: Yi'u gollal kala yamirgal: ina fey, neldaama, naatii wala dakkii.
orders.f2_desc: Jaɓu gollirɗe maa te ɓeydu stok maa sigoŋ.
orders.f3_desc: Yiilu kala yamirgooji maa ɓennuɗi ngam weeɓinde liggeey maa.

tracking.title: Topptagol waktu
tracking.description: Yi'u gollal yamirgal ñootoowo haa mu jéexa.

accounting.title: Hiisawal weeɓungol
accounting.subtitle: Kaalis maa e loxo maa
accounting.description: Hiisawal maa ina liggeeyo boppum. Kala njaayu, kala depans ina naat sigoŋ e téere hiisawal maa. Topptu kaalis maa te sosu bilan maa e 1 kiliik.
accounting.f1_desc: Yi'u ngalu maa, cogguuji e ɓurale maa e kala waktu.
accounting.f2_desc: Windu depans maa (fey suudu, kuraan, gollotooɓe) ngam anndude ɓurale maa koye.
accounting.f3_desc: Wàccu humpitooji hiisawal maa ngam saytukat maa wala ngam dencugol.

overview.title: Laawol hiisawal kuuɓto
overview.description: Saytu ɓurale maa e limtooji laaɓtuɗi.

expenses.title: Koldinaagu depans
expenses.description: Ɓeydu cogguuji jalla e mbeesu e weeɓre.

reports.title: Rappoor e xayeoji
reports.description: Yi'u kaalis maa no dogiri e sigoŋ.

clients.title: Koldinaagu kilyanɓe (CRM)
clients.subtitle: Dencal kilyanɓe maa
clients.description: Defal kilyanɓe maa wontu kilyanɓe dëggu. CRM bi ina denc kala istoriku njaayu. Koldinu ñamaande e keredit ngam a reera kaalis maa e "ñamaande" kadi.
clients.f1_desc: Istoriku njaayu timmungo, nimero telefon e ko neex kilyan bi.
clients.f2_desc: Topptu ñamaande kilyanɓe maa te xamël ko dëggu e koye.
clients.f3_desc: Neldu mbataaxali njaayu kilyanɓe maa e WhatsApp.

details.title: Sët kilyan timmungo
details.description: Kala humpito kilyan, istoriku njaayu e ñamaande/keredit.

campaigns.title: WhatsApp njaayu

settings.title: Paramétrage
settings.subtitle: Defal Stockman no mbuɗ-ɗaa nii
settings.description: Tëral Stockman no gollal maa haanirta nii: koldinu gollotooɓe maa, ɓeydu bitikaaji yu bees te heɓu ballo jaawngol.
settings.f1_desc: Ubbi sët ngam gollotooɓe maa te tëral li nu mbaɗi (seller, manager, admin).
settings.f2_desc: Ɓeydu te koldinu bitikaaji keewɗi e nder sët 1.
settings.f3_desc: Waylu kaalis, làkk e no aplikasyon bi woniri.

team.title: Koldinaagu ekip
team.description: Topptu gollotooɓe maa, roleeji e ko nu mbaɗi.

notifications.title: Suudu tinndinorgol
notifications.description: Tëral tinndinorgol stok e fattali amanaaji.

security.title: Ballo e Aar
security.description: Heɓu ballo e gollirgal te aar sët maa.

about.seo_desc: Anndu ekip Stockman e liggeey men ngam mbeesu njaayu e Afrik.
about.mission_desc: Emin njaɓi kala njaaƴoowo, famarɗo wala mawɗo, ina jogii sàrtu gollirɗe ɓurɗe moƴƴude. Stockman wonaa logicel tan — ko gollotooɗo maa ngam ɓeydagol maa.
about.member1_bio: Njaaƴoowo kaddunooɗo, o sosi Stockman ngam koldinaagu jàfe-jàfe makko.
about.member2_bio: Injénieur amanaaji e IA te mbeesu Afrik.
about.member3_bio: Ina heewi nano-go ngam wallude kuutortooɓe men.
about.value1_desc: Xarala bi ina wara weeɓde kadi kala nit ina mawan gollude ɗum.
about.value2_desc: Emin ɗoo — emin anndi dund maa e jàfe-jàfe maa.
about.value3_desc: Emin moƴƴinde Stockman kala waktu kadi sa mbataaxali maa.

blog.seo_desc: Peeje e ballo ngam koldinaagu njaayu, moƴƴinde stok te ɓeydude njaayu maa.
blog.try_stockman: Eto Stockman ngam huutorade peeje ɗee.

abandonner-cahier-stock.title: Ko waɗi a accata kaye ngam koldinaagu stok?
abandonner-cahier-stock.excerpt: Kaye ina jogii sigoŋ. Anndu no mbeesu kadi aara sa liggeey e njuumte e baasgol.
abandonner-cahier-stock.content:
Njaaƴooɓe heewɓe ina kuutortoo kaye ngam windude njaayu e stok. Ina yàggi, kono ina jogii riskuuji mawɗi.

1. Njuumte hiisawal

Njuumte famarɗo e hiisawal ina mawa njaayu maa timmungo. E logicel ni Stockman, hiisawal ngal jaawi te alaa njuumte.

2. Baasgol humpito

Kaye ina mawa reerde, wujjonoo wala jite tàkka e mum. Humpitooji maa e Stockman ina dencaa e cloud te ina yillee kala ɗo.

3. Alaa laawol timmungo

Ina jaaɓi anndude mbiddu ɓurdu njaayeede tan e dogo xub yi. Stockman ina rokka ma ɗum e kiliik 1.

Bile bëj

Naatgol e xarala wonaa coggu — ko njalla njalɗinoo ma waktu e kaalis fuɗɗoode lewru adanndu.

eviter-ruptures-fetes.title: No dawri-ɗaa njuumte stok e fët yi?
eviter-ruptures-fetes.excerpt: Noël e Tabaski ko waktuuji amanaaji. Pareel stok maa e waktu mum e ballo men.
eviter-ruptures-fetes.content:
Njuumte stok e fët yi ko baasgol kaalis mbeesu. No dawan-ɗaa ɗum.

Tingunoo waktu

Huutoro ko njaayu-ɗaa hito weesu ngam anndude ko soxal-ɗaa njaayu hito ngol.

Jëndu e waktu

Ñootooɓe ina jogii liggeey heewɗo. Jëndu gollirɗe maa simenn 2 wala 3 e waktu fët yi.

Huutoro tinndinorgol Stockman

Tëral tinndinorgol kadi Stockman yegal ma so gollirgal ina nawa.

augmenter-marge-2026.title: 3 peeje ngam ɓeydude ɓurale maa e 2026
augmenter-marge-2026.excerpt: Njaayu moƴƴi, kono ɓurale ɓuri! Jàngal no moƴƴintaa cogguuji jënd e cogguuji njaayu.
augmenter-marge-2026.content:
Ɓeydude coggu wonaa tan laawol ɓeydude kaalis. Suuda no liggortaa e ɓurale maa.

1. Wàccu baasgol

Gollirɗe dakkiiɗe wala wujjaaɗe ina jogii coggu mawngol. Topptagol moƴƴo stok ina mawa wàccu baasgol haa 30%.

2. Jokkondir e ñootoowo

So a jëndii gollirɗe keewɗe e Stockman Marketplace, a mawan heɓude cogguuji ɓurɗi moƴƴude.

3. Dencal kilyanɓe

Kilyan dëggu moƴƴi ɓuri kilyan mbeesu. Huutoro porogram keredit ngam kilyan bi wartugo bitik maa.

getting_started.title: Fuɗɗoode liggeey
getting_started.a1: Wàccu gollirgal ngal te topptu xibaaruuji e bët bi. Du ɓura 2 minit.
getting_started.q2: Mbele mi mawan huutorade gollirgal tawa internet alaa?
getting_started.a2: Waaw, Stockman ina liggeeyo e mode offline te ina denc humpitooji maa sigoŋ so internet arti.

account_billing.title: Sët e fey bi
account_billing.a1: Démal e Paramètres > Sécurité > Changer mot de passe.
account_billing.a2: Dina men rokke 14 bës de feyeere e kala gollirɗe mbeesu so a sosi sët maa.

technical_support.title: Ballo xarala
technical_support.a1: Ƴeew internet maa te anndu kadi a jogii xarala mbeesu. So jaaɓi, wàccu ko kadi.
technical_support.a2: A mawan neldu-de mbataake e suudu ballo wala e WhatsApp mbeesu.

terms.title: Sarɗiiji kuutoragol
terms.content:
Jam e Stockman.
Sarɗiiji kuutoragol ɗii (nu nwoowé "Sarɗiiji") ko sariya liggeey kadi jogii Kuutortooɗo o e Sosal-kat Stockman o.

TÉERE I: SARƊIIJI LIGGEEY

Marticle 1: Ko nu tekki

  • Plateforme: Kala xaralu Stockman.
  • Kuutortooɗo: Kompani wala nit kiy huutoroo gollirgal ngal ngam liggeeyam.
  • Sosal-kat: Stockman Inc., mooy borom Stockman.
  • Bitik: Suudu njaayu liggeey bi dogata.

Marticle 2: Li men bëggi

Stockman ko solisyon ERP ngir koldinaagu stok, POS e kilyanɓe. Ina doga ni liggeey (SaaS).

Marticle 3: Jaɓu sarɗiiji

So a yidɗi jokkude e Stockman foti a jaɓu sarɗiiji ɗii timmungo.

Marticle 4: Liggeey karallagal

Stockman wonaa tan natt humpitooji ludul liggeey. Kuutortooɗo o ina wara liggeeyo timmungo.

Marticle 5: Waylu sarɗiiji

Sosal-kat o ina jogii hakke waylude sarɗiiji ɗii waktu kala. So a jokkii liggeey o, a jaɓii sarɗiiji ɓeydaaɗi ɗii.

TÉERE II: UBBI SËT

Marticle 6: Windu

Kuutortooɗo o ina wara windude mbidduuji dëgguuji.

Marticle 7: Aar kodd bi

Kuutortooɗo o mooy denco koddum ɓaleere.

Marticle 8: Topptu sët bi

A mawan waylude mbidduji sët maa mbeesu.

Marticle 9: Sëtu gollotooɓe

Borom sët mawan ubbude sët goɗɗo ngam gollotooɓe mum te mooy njiit e gollal maɓɓe.

Marticle 10: Ndigal

Am na laawol roleeji (Administrator, Seller, Manager).

TÉERE III: NJAAYU MI

Marticle 11-18

Kuutortooɗo o mooy windo gollirɗe, njaayu e jallaaji. Stockman xaye la lay rokka. Sosal-kat o wonaa njiit e njuumte maa.

TÉERE IV-IX: MBIDDU, IA, AAR

IA mawan am njuumte. Humpitooji maa ena dencaade kadi. Yoonu RGPD ena doga. So naamnal ena ɗoo, yoonu Sénégal wala dëkk Sosal-kat bi mawan dogude.

privacy.title: Dawrugol njaayu
privacy.content:
Jam e Stockman. Aar humpito maa timmungo ko liggeey men mawngol.

1. Humpitooji nu denci

Men dencat: innde maa, email, telefon, mbidduuji bitik maa, njaayu e humpitooji xarala (IP, device).

2. Gollal humpitooji

Humpito maa ngam: koldinu stok maa, aar sët maa, moƴƴinde gollal men e yoonu.

3. Denc e Aar

Humpito maa ena dencaa e MongoDB Atlas kadi ena aaraa (encrypted). HTTPS lo men kuutorɗen.

4. Bokk humpitoji

Men jëndata wala men luyata humpito maa. Ak partenaire xarala rek la men koy bokkata so yoonu naamni nu.

5. Sarɗiiji maa (RGPD)

A mawan yi'ude, soppide wala dakkal humpito maa e gollirgal e Paramètres.

6. Woo nu

So a jogii naamnal, woo nu e gollirgal wala e contact@stockman.pro.
